CONTENT.Club career: Blin is a youth exponent from Le Mans but transferred to Ligue 1 side Toulouse in 2013. He made his Ligue 1 debut on 25 January 2015 against Evian Thonon Gaillard in a 1–0 away defeat. He played 85 minutes, before being substituted by Youssef Benali.In September 2018, Blin joined league rivals Amiens on loan for the 2018–19 season with Amiens securing an option to sign him permanently.On 11 June 2019, Blin signed a three-year contract after previously being loaned with French club Amiens.On 23 June 2021, he signed a three-year contract with an option for fourth year with Italian Serie B club Lecce. He played a total three seasons with the club, two of which in Serie A, also captaining the club on his final season with the Giallorossi.On 25 July 2024, Serie B club Palermo announced the permanent signing of Blin from Lecce.
CONTENT.External links: Alexis Blin at the French Football Federation (in French)Alexis Blin at the French Football Federation (archived) (in French)

SUMMARY: Alexis Blin (born 16 September 1996) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Serie B club Palermo.
